```c
#include <stdio.h>
#include <math.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

typedef struct { float x, y, z; } Vec3;

Vec3 vec3_add(Vec3 a, Vec3 b) { return (Vec3){a.x+b.x, a.y+b.y, a.z+b.z}; }
Vec3 vec3_sub(Vec3 a, Vec3 b) { return (Vec3){a.x-b.x, a.y-b.y, a.z-b.z}; }
Vec3 vec3_mul(Vec3 a, float t) { return (Vec3){a.x*t, a.y*t, a.z*t}; }
float vec3_dot(Vec3 a, Vec3 b) { return a.x*b.x + a.y*b.y + a.z*b.z; }
float vec3_len(Vec3 a) { return sqrtf(vec3_dot(a, a)); }
Vec3 vec3_normalize(Vec3 a) { float l = vec3_len(a); return (Vec3){a.x/l, a.y/l, a.z/l}; }

#define WIDTH 800
#define HEIGHT 600

// Scene
Vec3 light_dir;
Vec3 sphere_center = {0, -0.5, -5};
float sphere_radius = 1.0;

float sphere_intersect(Vec3 origin, Vec3 dir, Vec3 center, float radius) {
    Vec3 oc = vec3_sub(origin, center);
    float a = vec3_dot(dir, dir);
    float b = 2.0f * vec3_dot(oc, dir);
    float c = vec3_dot(oc, oc) - radius * radius;
    float disc = b*b - 4*a*c;
    if (disc < 0) return -1;
    float t = (-b - sqrtf(disc)) / (2*a);
    if (t < 0.001f) {
        t = (-b + sqrtf(disc)) / (2*a);
        if (t < 0.001f) return -1;
    }
    return t;
}

float plane_intersect(Vec3 origin, Vec3 dir, float plane_y) {
    if (fabsf(dir.y) < 0.0001f) return -1;
    float t = (plane_y - origin.y) / dir.y;
    if (t < 0.001f) return -1;
    return t;
}

int is_in_shadow(Vec3 point, Vec3 light) {
    float t = sphere_intersect(point, light, sphere_center, sphere_radius);
    return t > 0;
}

Vec3 sky_color(Vec3 dir) {
    float t = 0.5f * (dir.y + 1.0f);
    Vec3 white = {1, 1, 1};
    Vec3 blue = {0.5f, 0.7f, 1.0f};
    return vec3_add(vec3_mul(white, 1.0f - t), vec3_mul(blue, t));
}

Vec3 trace(Vec3 origin, Vec3 dir) {
    // Check sphere
    float t_sphere = sphere_intersect(origin, dir, sphere_center, sphere_radius);
    float t_plane = plane_intersect(origin, dir, -1.5f);
    
    // Find closest hit
    if (t_sphere > 0 && (t_plane < 0 || t_sphere < t_plane)) {
        // Sphere hit
        Vec3 hit = vec3_add(origin, vec3_mul(dir, t_sphere));
        Vec3 normal = vec3_normalize(vec3_sub(hit, sphere_center));
        
        float diffuse = fmaxf(0.0f, vec3_dot(normal, light_dir));
        float shade = 0.2f + 0.8f * diffuse;
        
        // Shadow check
        if (is_in_shadow(hit, light_dir)) {
            shade = 0.2f;
        }
        
        // Sphere color: (1.0, 0.2, 0.2) * shade
        return (Vec3){shade, 0.2f * shade, 0.2f * shade};
    } else if (t_plane > 0) {
        // Plane hit
        Vec3 hit = vec3_add(origin, vec3_mul(dir, t_plane));
        
        // Checkerboard
        int ix = (int)floorf(hit.x);
        int iz = (int)floorf(hit.z);
        float checker = ((ix + iz) & 1) ? 0.4f : 0.9f;
        
        // Ground normal is (0, 1, 0)
        float diffuse = fmaxf(0.0f, vec3_dot((Vec3){0,1,0}, light_dir));
        float shade = 0.2f + 0.8f * diffuse;
        
        // Shadow check
        if (is_in_shadow(hit, light_dir)) {
            shade = 0.2f;
        }
        
        float c = checker * shade;
        return (Vec3){c, c, c};
    }
    
    // Sky
    return sky_color(dir);
}

int main() {
    light_dir = vec3_normalize((Vec3){1, 1, -1});
    
    fprintf(stderr, "Creating high-resolution image: %dx%d\n", WIDTH, HEIGHT);
    fprintf(stderr, "This will be downsampled with ffmpeg after rendering\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "Rendering high-resolution image...\n");
    
    FILE *f = fopen("image.ppm", "w");
    fprintf(f, "P3\n%d %d\n255\n", WIDTH, HEIGHT);
    
    for (int y = 0; y < HEIGHT; y++) {
        fprintf(stderr, "\rProgress: %.1f%%", y * 100.0f / 600.0f);
        
        for (int x = 0; x < WIDTH; x++) {
            float u = x / 799.0f * 2.6666667f - 1.3333333f;
            float v = 1.0f - 2.0f * y / 599.0f;
            
            Vec3 dir = vec3_normalize((Vec3){u, v, -1.0f});
            Vec3 color = trace((Vec3){0,0,0}, dir);
            
            int r = (int)(fminf(color.x, 1.0f) * 255.99f);
            int g = (int)(fminf(color.y, 1.0f) * 255.99f);
            int b = (int)(fminf(color.z, 1.0f) * 255.99f);
            
            fprintf(f, "%d %d %d\n", r, g, b);
        }
    }
    
    fprintf(stderr, "\nRendering complete\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "Wrote image to %s\n", "image.ppm");
    fprintf(stdout, "Done.\n");
    
    fclose(f);
    return 0;
}
```
